jobs.title: Business Analyst - Federal Sector
jobs.description:
Procon is a top-ranked construction management and technology consulting firm with 25 years of experience delivering high‑impact projects across the U.S. and worldwide. An ENR Top 100 CM/PM firm for five consecutive years, we specialize in program management, project controls, commissioning, and virtual intelligence—and offer an excellent platform to grow your career while shaping the future of the built environment.
Procon now seeks a Business Analyst - Federal Sector for a long term opportunity that is fully remote. This role requires various skills and experience as listed below.

jobs.title: Senior Product Owner, Learning Infrastructure Ecosystem
jobs.description:
Develops, proposes and / or implements learning policies, methods, processes or programs, and advises managers and / or employees accordingly for (an) assigned organization(s).

Siemens Healthineers is seeking a Senior Product Owner – Learning Infrastructure Ecosystem to lead the strategy, development, and continuous evolution of our global learning platforms.

This role will oversee the end-to-end ownership of our learning ecosystem (including LMS, LXP, and related technologies), ensuring it delivers a seamless user experience and acts as a strategic enabler for business performance and scala
